title: scybalium depressum
intro: Scybalium depressum, also known as the helmet orchid, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the subfamily Apostasioideae. Traditionally, Scybalium depressum is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Scybalium depressum can be used in the form of a tincture or decoction, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
